description_long: This is a sealed snack package with a vibrant red and white color scheme, featuring the brand name 'FRESH' prominently in a bold, circular logo on the front. The upper section of the bag displays the company name 'SIKDER FOOD PRODUCTS LIMITED' and the phrase 'Comfortable Chips Package' in white script. The lower portion of the package shows a photographic image of triangular, golden-brown chips, suggesting the contents inside. The sides of the bag are slightly crinkled, typical of flexible plastic snack packaging, and there are images of tomatoes and green herbs, possibly hinting at the flavor. The overall shape is a standard pillow pouch, commonly used for chips and similar snacks, with a glossy finish that reflects light. No nutritional or ingredient information is visible on any side.
description: A glossy red and white snack bag labeled 'FRESH', featuring images of chips and tomatoes, with bold branding and a crinkled plastic appearance.
description_view_0: The front view shows the full branding, product name, and a clear image of the chips and tomatoes on the lower half.
description_view_1: The left-angled view highlights the side crinkles and gives a partial view of the chips and tomato graphics, with the branding still visible.
description_view_2: The rear-left view shows the back and side of the bag, with the branding partially visible and the chip image wrapping around the side.
description_view_3: The right-angled view emphasizes the side of the bag, with the tomato image more prominent and the branding partially obscured.
attribute_brand_logo: A circular red and white logo with the word 'FRESH' in bold white letters, located centrally on the front of the bag.
attribute_flavor_indication: Images of tomatoes and green herbs on the front suggest a tomato or herb flavor.
